ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_parcels" (
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land parcel */,
  "organisation_uri" TEXT /* URI link to the organization or authority managing the parcel */,
  "site_reference" INTEGER /* Reference number for the parcel site */,
  "site_name_address" TEXT /* Address and name of the site */,
  "siteplan_url" TEXT /* URL of the site plan */,
  "geo_y" REAL /* Geographic Y coordinate of the site */,
  "geo_x" REAL /* Geographic X coordinate of the site */,
  "hectares" REAL /* Area of the land parcel in hectares */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status (e.g., owned, not owned by a public authority) */,
  "planning_status" TEXT /* Planning status (e.g., permissioned, not permissioned) */,
  "land_use_type" TEXT /* Type of land use (e.g., residential, commercial, industrial) */,
  "land_use_description" TEXT /* Description of the land use */,
  "current_development_status" TEXT /* Current status of development on the parcel */,
  "redevelopment_potential" INTEGER /* Indicates if the parcel has redevelopment potential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning permission record */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel associated with the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of planning permission (e.g., outline, full) */,
  "permission_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was granted */,
  "planning_history" TEXT /* History of planning applications related to the parcel */,
  "applicant_name" TEXT /* Name of the applicant */,
  "applicant_email" TEXT /* Email address of the applicant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_permissions_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hazardous_substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hazardous substance entry */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel associated with the substance */,
  "substance_name" TEXT /* Name of the hazardous substance */,
  "substance_description" TEXT /* Description of the hazardous substance */,
  "concentration_level" REAL /* Concentration level of the substance */,
  "mitigation_measures" TEXT /* Measures taken to mitigate the substance's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hazardous_substances_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliverables" (
  "deliverable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deliverable record */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel for which the deliverable applies */,
  "deliverable_name" TEXT /* Name of the deliverable (e.g., housing units, commercial space) */,
  "net_dwellings_range_from" INTEGER /* Minimum number of dwellings to be provided */,
  "net_dwellings_range_to" INTEGER /* Maximum number of dwellings to be provided */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the deliverable is expected to be completed */,
  "responsible_party" TEXT /* Party responsible for delivering the developable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deliverable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliverables_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note entry */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel associated with the note */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text content of the note */,
  "note_date" TEXT /* Date when the note was created */,
  "note_author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update record */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel associated with the update */,
  "first_added_date" TEXT /* Date when the parcel was first added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the parcel record was last updated */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the planning or development status, if applicable */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, developer, public) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parcel being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "planning_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each planning application */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel associated with the application */,
  "application_type" TEXT /* Type of planning application (e.g., outline, full) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the planning application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_planning_applications_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "redevelopment_opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each redevelopment opportunity */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel with redevelopment potential */,
  "opportunity_type" TEXT /* Type of redevelopment opportunity (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "opportunity_description" TEXT /* Description of the redevelopment opportunity */,
  "feasibility_study" INTEGER /* Indicates if a feasibility study has been conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_redevelopment_opportunities_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel affected by the regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "regulation_description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the regulation became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulations_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "parcel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the land parcel being monitored */,
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the regulation being tracked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  "non_compliance_reason" TEXT /* Reason for non-compliance, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_parcel_id FOREIGN KEY ("parcel_id") REFERENCES land_parcels ("parcel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_regulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("regulation_id") REFERENCES regulations ("regulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., planning application, compliance) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Actual report data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)
